items.name: Mine Water Vial
items.description: A vial of water from Ember Vein's depths.

items.name: Archivist's Codex
items.description: A codex from the Archive of Ages, inscribed with ley door sigils.

items.name: Ironmark Tunnel Map
items.description: A hand-drawn map showing a hidden passage into Ironmark Citadel.

items.name: Ironmark Key
items.description: A heavy iron key bearing the Ironmark garrison seal.

items.name: Forgewright Master Key
items.description: A master key from the Ashmark Factory, opening all Compact-era locks.

items.name: Map to the Convergence
items.description: A military map marking the location of the Convergence.

items.name: Catacomb Map
items.description: A fragile map revealing Valdris's hidden catacomb passages.

items.name: Broodchamber Map
items.description: A pheromone-marked map showing Caldera's nest network.

items.name: Keeper's Index
items.description: A translation index for the Dry Well's pictographic script.

items.name: Vein Guardian's Core
items.description: A memento from the Vein Guardian.
items.flavor_text: A crystalline core still warm with ember heat.

items.name: Fenmother's Tear
items.description: A memento from the Corrupted Fenmother.
items.flavor_text: A single clear drop — the Fenmother's grief, crystallized.

items.name: Operator's Badge
items.description: A memento from The Ironbound.
items.flavor_text: Tarnished name badge. The second operator's name is still legible.

items.name: Cael's Pendant
items.description: A memento from Cael.
items.flavor_text: A locket with a pressed flower inside. Lira recognizes it.

items.name: Cael's Sword
items.description: A memento from the Pallor Incarnate.
items.flavor_text: The blade is cold. It will not rust.

items.name: Vaelith's Quill
items.description: A memento from Vaelith.
items.flavor_text: An 800-year-old scholar's quill. The ink is still wet.

items.name: Lost Page
items.description: A memento from The Index.
items.flavor_text: A single page from the catalogue. One name. One story.

items.name: Grey Echo Shard
items.description: A memento from the Pallor Echo.
items.flavor_text: A fragment of someone Cael used to be.

items.name: Boring Engine Schematic
items.description: A schematic for an advanced Forgewright weapon component.
items.acquired_from: Rail Tunnels East Tunnel secret room

items.name: Forge Schematic
items.description: A schematic required to forge the Arcanite Lance.

items.name: Dael's Ledger
items.description: Dael Corran's personal records documenting the extraction timeline and worker casualties.
items.acquired_from: Ashmark Factory Depths post-boss (The Fading Shifts quest)

items.name: Fenmother's Blessing
items.description: A blessing granted by the Fenmother for safe passage.

items.name: Compact Battle Standard
items.description: A war-torn banner from the Valdris Siege.

items.name: Pallor-Laced Iron
items.description: A chunk of iron threaded with Pallor residue.
items.plot_effect: Evidence of Pallor in Compact war machines

items.name: Corrupted Tuning Fork
items.description: A tuning fork warped by Ashmark's corruption.
items.plot_effect: Links Ashmark corruption to Vaelith's broader plan

items.name: Caldera Employee Card
items.description: A Compact officer's employee card, pickpocketed by Sable.

items.name: Valdris Crest
items.description: The crest of Valdris, entrusted by Sir Aldric.
items.acquired_from: Sir Aldric, Oasis A (The Last Banner quest)
items.plot_effect: Unlocks bonus dialogue in Edren's Pallor trial

items.name: First Tree Seed
items.description: A seed from the First Tree, found in the Ashgrove Undercroft.
items.plot_effect: Used at Convergence meadow post-game to trigger planting scene

items.name: Spirit Vessel
items.description: An empty fenwood bowl lined with thin ley-crystal. It could hold sacred water.

items.name: Spirit Vessel (Filled)
items.description: A fenwood bowl brimming with pure spring water. It glows faintly with spiritual energy.
items.acquired_from: Pure Spring in Fenmother's Hollow F1
